description: This Java class 'RiskDecisioningService' provides a deterministic risk scoring and decision engine for loan applications. It processes JSON input data, computes a risk score based on various financial and document-based factors, optionally incorporates credit bureau reports via an external client, and outputs a decision such as PRE_QUALIFIED, MANUAL_REVIEW, or DECLINED along with a reason. The class includes logic for fast rule-based declinations, scoring adjustments based on financial metrics, document flags, credit scores, and thresholds for decision-making.

classes.name: RiskDecisioningService
classes.description: Service class for scoring and decisioning of loan applications based on input JSON data and optional credit bureau report.

classes.name: RiskDecision
classes.description: Record representing the risk score, decision enum, and rationale for loan application.

classes.name: Decision
classes.description: Enum defining possible loan decision outcomes: PRE_QUALIFIED, MANUAL_REVIEW, DECLINED.

methods.name: scoreAndDecide
methods.description: Main method to compute risk score and make a decision based on input draft JSON data.

methods.name: buildReason
methods.description: Constructs a detailed explanation string for the risk decision and score.

methods.name: extractCreditBureauRequest
methods.description: Extracts credit bureau request parameters from the JSON input.

methods.name: firstText
methods.description: Helper to retrieve the first non-empty textual value from multiple JSON nodes.

methods.name: readJsonOrEmptyObject
methods.description: Parses JSON string into JsonNode or returns empty object on failure.

methods.name: firstDecimal
methods.description: Retrieves the first valid BigDecimal from multiple JSON nodes.

methods.name: firstInteger
methods.description: Retrieves the first valid Integer from multiple JSON nodes.

methods.name: firstBoolean
methods.description: Retrieves the first valid boolean value from multiple JSON nodes.
